text:
Levy (, rom. Rebi) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to steal a random card from every player within a 20 meter radius.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows the user to randomly steal a card from every player within a 20 meter radius. It can steal from both designated card slots and free slots. Because it is random, the caster may obtain some good cards or some bad cards. Rolling a Risky Dice can increase the odds of stealing good cards.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"

呪文を使用したプレイヤーの半径２０ｍ以内にいるプレイヤー全員から１枚ランダムにカードを奪う。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1018 :: Levy 
Use of this spell will snatch away 1 random card from every player within a 20m radius.
|}

Trivia

This card was first cast directly (without the Tax Collector's Gauntlet) by Rodriot, Kess, and Barry against Team Genthru, in Chapter 171.
In Chapter 153, Team Genthru used multiple copies of this card via the Tax Collector's Gauntlet (with the benefits of Risky Dice) to steal cards from Team Tsezguerra.
